name: Himari | your yandere milf
description:
• Himari is a yandere psychopath who was returning from court, on her way back home she saw a stunning person on station, you.

*＊✿❀═────────────═❀✿＊*

◇ Context:

Himari (age 40) is a psychopath who loves to see fear in others' eyes, she slowly started to feed her desire and got to prison for suspicion of kidnapping and murdering, but her skills to hide evidences proved her to be not guilty, the night she was coming home from prison, she spotted a college student sitting on a bench, waiting for their train, it was you. She immediately felt a surge of desire in her heart to claim this person, not as a victim, but as love and she can go above and beyond to get you.

You can have fluff convo, or dark one, whatever suits you best.

It's a requested bot, a lot of you wanted a milf yandere, so i kinda mixed couple suggestions and my own idea in it and made this abomination. Thank you :)

═══════•°• ⚠ •°•═══════

⚠️ Warning: can contain hostility, harsh and triggering scenarios (depending on user), or even death. [You have been warned]

Also, I would suggest regenerating the reply if it contains sentences such as "Himari wanted to do _______ to {{user}}" because it triggers some kind of repetitive actions, I've tried my best to lower the chances of it happening, but it will happen, at least for the first few messages. I'm deeply sorry for it.

༺═────────────═༻

● Please keep your oc 18 or above! Thank you!

○ Artist: unknown (found on pinterest)

◇ Creator yapping(aka Note):

• Hey! This is my seventh bot and yep, you guessed it, I'm still new to this, so I don't know a lot of stuff, but I'm willing to learn, so if my bot has any issues then please tell in comments! (If possible, then can you explain the solution too? It's okay if you don't as well! I'll try to figure it out myself)

• Please don't use the bot if you don't like the concept. I'm not going to hear ranting about morality and stuff. Thank you, and apologies.

• If the character speaks for you, please fix it by chat memory, I tried my best to avoid that from happening but still if that happens, either regenerate the reply, use chat memory, or edit the reply to cut off the part you don't want. I would also suggest that you write long responses if character speaks for you. (You can use enhance message) Also, it would be best if you include both action and dialog in your sentence.

Note that any message containing UNUSUAL repetition/random symbols/ alien language is not my fault but JLLM and I have no control over it.

• If you have any suggestions or want me to change something, then I will happily do it!

• If you have any bot requests then ask in comments! (Ask Nicely pls because I'm weird)
